verses.geez: አሌ፡ ሎሙ፡ ለውሉደ፡ ዓላውያን፣፡ ከመዝ፡ ይቤ፡ እግዚአብሔር፤ ገበርክሙአ፡ ምክረ፡ ወአኮ፡ በእንቲአየ፣፡ ወሠራዕክሙ፡ አኮ፡ በእንተ፡ መንፈስየ፡ ከመ፡ ትወስኩ፡ ኃጢአተ፡ በዲበ፡ ኃጢአት።

translations.lxx: Woe to the apostate children, saith the Lord: ye have framed counsel, not by me, and covenants not by my Spirit, to add sins to sins:
translations.kjv: Woe to the rebellious children, saith the LORD, that take counsel, but not of me; and that cover with a covering, but not of my spirit, that they may add sin to sin:

verses.geez: እለ፡ ተሐውሩ፡ ወትወርዱ፡ ብሔረ፡ ግብጽ፡ ወኢሰአሉኒ፡ እርድኦሙ፡ እምግብጽ፡ ወእምፈርዖን።

translations.lxx: even they that proceed to go down into Egypt, but they have not enquired of me, that they might be helped by Pharao, and protected by the Egyptians.
translations.kjv: That walk to go down into Egypt, and have not asked at my mouth; to strengthen themselves in the strength of Pharaoh, and to trust in the shadow of Egypt!

verses.geez: ወይከውነክሙ፡ ፈርዖን፡ ወልታ፡ ኃሣር፡ ወለእለ፡ ተወከልክሙ፡ በግብጽ፡ ይከውኑ፡ ጽዕለተ።

translations.lxx: For the protection of Pharao shall be to you a disgrace, and there shall be a reproach to them that trust in Egypt.
translations.kjv: Therefore shall the strength of Pharaoh be your shame, and the trust in the shadow of Egypt your confusion.

verses.geez: መላእክተ፡ ኤንጣን፡ ሐዋርያት፡ እኩያን።

translations.lxx: For there are princes in Tanes, evil messengers.
translations.kjv: For his princes were at Zoan, and his ambassadors came to Hanes.

verses.geez: ወከንቶ፡ ይፃምዉ፡ ኀበ፡ አሕዛብ፡ እለ፡ ኢይበቍዕዎሙ፡ ለረድኤት፡ ዘእንበለ፡ ለኃሣር፡ ወለጽዕለት።

translations.lxx: In vain shall they labour in seeking to a people, which shall not profit them for help, but shall be for a shame and reproach.
translations.kjv: They were all ashamed of a people that could not profit them, nor be an help nor profit, but a shame, and also a reproach.

verses.geez: በሕማም፡ ወበምንዳቤ፡ አንበሳ፡ ወእጓለ፡ አንበሳ፣፡ ወእምህየ፡ አራዊተ፡ ምድር፡ ዘይሰርር፡ እለ፡ ይፄዕኑ፡ በአግማል፡ ወበአእዱግ፡ ብዕሎሙ፡ ወይወስዱ፡ ኀበ፡ አሕዛብ፡ ዘኢይበቍዕዎሙ፡ ለረድኤት፡ ዘእንበለ፡ ለኃሣር፡ ወለጽዕለት።

translations.lxx: The Vision of the Quadrupeds in the Desert. In affliction and distress, where are the lion and lion's whelp, thence come also asps, and the young of flying asps, there shall they be who bore their wealth on asses and camels to a nation which shall not profit them.
translations.kjv: The burden of the beasts of the south: into the land of trouble and anguish, from whence come the young and old lion, the viper and fiery flying serpent, they will carry their riches upon the shoulders of young asses, and their treasures upon the bunches of camels, to a people that shall not profit them.

verses.geez: ከንቶኬ፡ ግብጽ፡ ኢይበቍዑክሙ፤ ንግሮሙ፡ ከመ፡ ከንቱ፡ ዘተማዐዱ።

translations.lxx: The Egyptians shall help you utterly in vain: tell them, This your consolation is vain.
translations.kjv: For the Egyptians shall help in vain, and to no purpose: therefore have I cried concerning this, Their strength is to sit still.

verses.geez: ወይእዜኒ፡ ንበር፡ ወጸሐፎ፡ ለዝንቱ፡ ውስተ፡ ሰሌዳ፡ ወይከውን፡ በመዋዕለ፡ ዕድሜሁ፡ ወአስከ፡ ለዓለም።

translations.lxx: Now then sit down and write these words on a tablet, and in a book; for these things shall be for many long days, and even for ever.
translations.kjv: Now go, write it before them in a table, and note it in a book, that it may be for the time to come for ever and ever:

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ሕዝብ፡ ዓላውያን፡ እሙንቱ፣፡ ውሉደ፡ ሐሰት፡ እለ፡ አበዩ፡ ሰሚዐ፡ ሕገ፡ እግዚአብሔር።

translations.lxx: For the people is disobedient, false children, who would not hear the law of God:
translations.kjv: That this is a rebellious people, lying children, children that will not hear the law of the LORD:

verses.geez: እለ፡ ይብልዎሙ፡ ለነቢያት፡ ኢትዜንዉነ፣፡ ወለእለሂ፡ ይሬእዩ፡ ራእየ፤ ኢትንግሩነ፣፡ ወመሰ፡ ትነግሩነ፡ ካልእተ፡ ጌጋየ፡ አይድዑነ።

translations.lxx: who say to the prophets, Report not to us; and to them that see visions, Speak them not to us, but speak and report to us another error;
translations.kjv: Which say to the seers, See not; and to the prophets, Prophesy not unto us right things, speak unto us smooth things, prophesy deceits:

verses.geez: ወሚጡነ፡ እምዛቲ፡ ፍኖት፤ ወአኅድጉነ፡ ዘንተ፡ አሠረ፡ ወሠዐሩ፡ እምኔነ፡ ትምህርተ፡ እስራኤል።

translations.lxx: and turn us aside from this way; remove from us this path, and remove from us the oracle of Israel.
translations.kjv: Get you out of the way, turn aside out of the path, cause the Holy One of Israel to cease from before us.

verses.geez: በእንተ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ከመዝ፡ ይቤ፡ ቅዱሰ፡ እስራኤል፤ እስመ፡ ክሕድክምዎ፡ ለዝንቱ፡ ነገር፡ ወተወከልክሙ፡ በሐሰት፡ ወአንጐርጐርክሙ፡ ወተአመንክሙ፡ በዝንቱ፡ ነገር።

translations.lxx: Therefore thus saith the Holy One of Israel, Because ye have refused to obey these words, and have trusted in falsehood; and because thou hast murmured, and been confident in this respect:
translations.kjv: Wherefore thus saith the Holy One of Israel, Because ye despise this word, and trust in oppression and perverseness, and stay thereon:

verses.geez: እንከ፡ በእንተ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ትከውነክሙ፡ ዛቲ፡ ኃጢአትክሙ፡ ከመ፡ አረፍት፡ ውድቅት፡ እንተ፡ በጊዜሃ፡ ሀገር፡ ጽንዕት፡ ወወድቀት፡ ግብተ።

translations.lxx: therefore shall this sin be to you as a wall suddenly falling when a strong city has been taken, of which the fall is very near at hand.
translations.kjv: Therefore this iniquity shall be to you as a breach ready to fall, swelling out in a high wall, whose breaking cometh suddenly at an instant.

verses.geez: ወድቀታሂ፡ ከመ፡ ቅጥቃጤ፡ ጻሕበ፡ ልሕኵት፡ ወይከውኑ፡ ድቁቀ፡ አግልዕተ፡ ወኢይረክቡ፡ በውስቴቱ፡ ገልዓ፡ በዘይወስዱ፡ እሳተ፡ ወኢበዘያወክፉ፡ ማየ፡ ኅዳጠ።

translations.lxx: And the fall thereof shall be as the breaking of an earthen vessel, as small fragments of a pitcher, so that thou shouldest not find among them a sherd, with which thou mightest take up fire, and with which thou shouldest draw a little water.
translations.kjv: And he shall break it as the breaking of the potters’ vessel that is broken in pieces; he shall not spare: so that there shall not be found in the bursting of it a sherd to take fire from the hearth, or to take water withal out of the pit.

verses.geez: ከመዝ፡ ይቤ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ቅዱሰ፡ እስራኤል፤ እምከመአ፡ ነሳሕከ፡ ወበከይከ፣፡ ተሐዩ፡ ወተአምር፡ ኀበ፡ ሀለውከ፤ እስመ፡ ተወከልከ፡ በከንቱ፡ ወከንቶ፡ ይከውነክሙ፡ ኃይልክሙ።

translations.lxx: Thus saith the Lord, the Holy Lord of Israel; When thou shalt turn and mourn, then thou shalt be saved; and thou shalt know where thou wast, when thou didst trust in vanities: then your strength became vain, yet ye would not hearken:
translations.kjv: For thus saith the Lord GOD, the Holy One of Israel; In returning and rest shall ye be saved; in quietness and in confidence shall be your strength: and ye would not.

verses.geez: ወትቤሉ፤ በአፍራሲነ፡ ናመሥጥ፡ ወበእንተ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ትጐይዩ፡ ወትብሉ፤ ንፄዐን፡ ረዋጼ፡ ፈረሰ፤ በእንተ፡ ዝንቱኬ፡ ረዋጽያን፡ እሙንቱ፡ እለ፡ ይዴግኑክሙ።

translations.lxx: but ye said, We will flee upon horses; therefore shall ye flee: and, We will be aided by swift riders; therefore shall they that pursue you be swift.
translations.kjv: But ye said, No; for we will flee upon horses; therefore shall ye flee: and, We will ride upon the swift; therefore shall they that pursue you be swift.

verses.geez: ይሜምዑ፡ ፲፻፡ እምድምፀ፡ ፩ወእምቃለ፭፡ ይጐይዩ፡ ብዙኃን፡ እስከ፡ ትተርፉ፡ ከመ፡ ሐሠር፡ ውዑይ።

translations.lxx: A thousand shall flee because of the voice of one, and many shall flee on account of the voice of five; until ye be left as a signal-post upon a mountain, and as one bearing an ensign upon a hill.
translations.kjv: One thousand shall flee at the rebuke of one; at the rebuke of five shall ye flee: till ye be left as a beacon upon the top of a mountain, and as an ensign on an hill.

verses.geez: ወካዕበ፡ ይሣሀለክሙ፡ እግዚአብሔር፣፡ ወበእንተ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ተለዐለ፡ ከመ፡ ይምሐርክሙ፡ እስመ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክነ፡ መኰንን፡ ውእቱ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord will again wait, that he may pity you, and will therefore be exalted that he may have mercy upon you: because the Lord your God is a judge: blessed are they that stay themselves upon him.
translations.kjv: And therefore will the LORD wait, that he may be gracious unto you, and therefore will he be exalted, that he may have mercy upon you: for the LORD is a God of judgment: blessed are all they that wait for him.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ሕዝብ፡ ቅዱስ፡ የኀድር፡ ውስተ፡ ኢየሩሳሌም፡ በጽዮን።

translations.lxx: For the holy people shall dwell in Sion: and whereas Jerusalem has wept bitterly, saying, Pity me; he shall pity thee: when he perceived the voice of thy cry, he hearkened to thee.
translations.kjv: For the people shall dwell in Zion at Jerusalem: thou shalt weep no more: he will be very gracious unto thee at the voice of thy cry; when he shall hear it, he will answer thee.

verses.geez: ወይሁበክሙ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ሲሳየክሙ፡ በሕማም፡ ወማየክሙሂ፡ በምንዳቤ፣፡ ወኢይቀርብ፡ እንከ፡ ዘያስሕተክሙ፤ ወይሬእያ፡ አዕይንቲከ፡ ላዕለ፡ እለ፡ አስሐቱከ።

translations.lxx: And though the Lord shall give you the bread of affliction and scant water, yet they that cause thee to err shall no more at all draw nigh to thee; for thine eyes shall see those that cause thee to err,
translations.kjv: And though the Lord give you the bread of adversity, and the water of affliction, yet shall not thy teachers be removed into a corner any more, but thine eyes shall see thy teachers:

verses.geez: ወይስምዓ፡ እዘኒከ፡ ድምፆሙ፡ ለእለ፡ ስሕቱ፡ በድኅሬከ፣፡ እለ፡ ይብሉ፤ ንሖር፡ በዛቲ፡ ፍኖት፡ እመሂ፡ ለየማን፡ ወእመሂ፡ ለፀጋም።

translations.lxx: and thine ears shall hear the words of them that went after thee to lead thee astray, who say, This is the way, let us walk in it, whether to the right or to the left.
translations.kjv: And thine ears shall hear a word behind thee, saying, This is the way, walk ye in it, when ye turn to the right hand, and when ye turn to the left.

verses.geez: ወምዕረኒ፡ መንገለ፡ ጣዖት፡ እለ፡ ቅፉላን፡ በብሩር፡ ወሥርግዋን፡ በወርቅ፤ ወትገብር፡ ደቃቀ፡ ወደመቀ፡ ወትክዕዎ፡ ከመ፡ ማይ፡ እንተ፡ ትነብር፡ ትክት፡ ወከመ፡ እዳዋት፡ ትገድፉ፡ ውስቴቶን።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt pollute the plated idols, and thou shalt grind to powder the gilt ones, and shalt scatter them as the water of a removed woman, and thou shalt thrust them forth as dung.
translations.kjv: Ye shall defile also the covering of thy graven images of silver, and the ornament of thy molten images of gold: thou shalt cast them away as a menstruous cloth; thou shalt say unto it, Get thee hence.

verses.geez: ውእተ፡ አሚረ፡ ይዘንም፡ ለዘርአ፡ ምድርከ፡ ወይከውን፡ ጽጋብ፡ ለማእረረ፡ እክለ፡ ምድርከ፡ ወይሰብሕ፡ መራዕይከ፡ ወይትረዐይ፡ ብሔረ፡ ርሒበ፡ ወሥዑረ።

translations.lxx: Then shall there be rain to the seed of thy land; and the bread of the fruit of thy land shall be plenteous and rich: and thy cattle shall feed in that day in a fertile and spacious place.
translations.kjv: Then shall he give the rain of thy seed, that thou shalt sow the ground withal; and bread of the increase of the earth, and it shall be fat and plenteous: in that day shall thy cattle feed in large pastures.

verses.geez: ወይቀምሑ፡ ብዕራይክሙ፡ ወአሥዋሪክሙ፡ እለ፡ ይትጌበርዋ፡ ለምድር፡ ሐሠረ፡ ዘተሖሰ፡ ምስለ፡ ሰገም።

translations.lxx: Your bulls and your oxen that till the ground, shall eat chaff mixed with winnowed barley.
translations.kjv: The oxen likewise and the young asses that ear the ground shall eat clean provender, which hath been winnowed with the shovel and with the fan.

verses.geez: ወይከውን፡ ዲበ፡ ኵሉ፡ አድባር፡ ነዋኃት፡ ወውስተ፡ ኵሉ፡ አውግር፡ ልዑል፡ ይውኅዝ፡ ማይ፡ ውእተ፡ አሚረ፣፡ አመ፡ ኀልቁ፡ ብዙኃን፡ ወአመ፡ ወድቀ፡ ማኅፈድ።

translations.lxx: And there shall be upon every lofty mountain and upon every high hill, water running in that day, when many shall perish, and when the towers shall fall.
translations.kjv: And there shall be upon every high mountain, and upon every high hill, rivers and streams of waters in the day of the great slaughter, when the towers fall.

verses.geez: ወይከውን፡ ብርሃነ፡ ወርኅ፡ ከመ፡ ብርሃነ፡ ፀሐይ፣፡ ወይከውን፡ ብርሃነ፡ ፀሐይ፡ ምስብዒተ፡ ውእተ፡ አሚረ፣፡ አመ፡ ፈወሰ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ቍስለ፡ ሕዝቡ፡ ወይፌስስ፡ ሕማመ፡ መቅሠፍትከ።

translations.lxx: And the light of the moon shall be as the light of the sun, and the light of the sun shall be sevenfold in the day when the Lord shall heal the breach of his people, and shall heal the pain of thy wound.
translations.kjv: Moreover the light of the moon shall be as the light of the sun, and the light of the sun shall be sevenfold, as the light of seven days, in the day that the LORD bindeth up the breach of his people, and healeth the stroke of their wound.

verses.geez: ናሁ፡ ይመጽእ፡ ስመ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ በጕንዱይ፡ መዋዕል፡ ወይነድድ፡ መዐቱ፤ ምስለ፡ ስብሐተ፡ ቃለ፡ ከናፍሪሁ፡ ወምሉእ፡ ቃለ፡ መዐቱ፡ ወትበልዕ፡ ከመ፡ እሳት፡ መቅሠፍተ፡ መዐቱ።

translations.lxx: Behold, the name of the Lord comes after a long time, burning wrath: the word of his lips is with glory, a word full of anger, and the anger of his wrath shall devour as fire.
translations.kjv: Behold, the name of the LORD cometh from far, burning with his anger, and the burden thereof is heavy: his lips are full of indignation, and his tongue as a devouring fire:

verses.geez: ወትውኅዝ፡ መንፈሱ፡ ከመ፡ ማይ፡ ውስተ፡ ሙራድ፡ ዘይበጽሕ፡ እስከ፡ ክሳድ፤ ይትናፈቅ፡ ከመ፡ ይሁኮሙ፡ ለአሕዛብ፡ ወያስሕቶሙ፡ ውስተ፡ ከንቱ፡ ወይዴግኖሙ፡ ጌጋይ፡ ወይእኅዞሙ፡ ወይትቤቀሎሙ፡ ውስተ፡ ገጾሙ።

translations.lxx: And his breath, as rushing water in a valley, shall reach as far as the neck, and be divided, to confound the nations for their vain error: error also shall pursue them, and overtake them.
translations.kjv: And his breath, as an overflowing stream, shall reach to the midst of the neck, to sift the nations with the sieve of vanity: and there shall be a bridle in the jaws of the people, causing them to err.

verses.geez: ወትረኑ፡ ትትፌሥሑ፡ ወትበውኡ፡ ውስተ፡ መቅደስየ፡ እንዘ፡ ዘልፈ፡ ትገብሩ፡ በዓለ፣፡ ወከመ፡ ፍሡሓን፡ ትበውኡ፡ በዕንዚራ፡ ውስተ፡ ደብረ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ቅዱሰ፡ እስራኤል።

translations.lxx: Must ye always rejoice, and go into my holy places continually, as they that keep a feast? and must ye go with a pipe, as those that rejoice, into the mountain of the Lord, to the God of Israel?
translations.kjv: Ye shall have a song, as in the night when a holy solemnity is kept; and gladness of heart, as when one goeth with a pipe to come into the mountain of the LORD, to the mighty One of Israel.

verses.geez: ወያሰምዕ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ቃለ፡ ስብሐቲሁ፡ ወያርኢ፡ መዐተ፡ መዝራዕቱ፡ ወመቅሠፍተ፡ መዐቱ፤ ወያነድድ፡ በእሳት፡ በላዒ፡ ወበኃይለ፡ ፀዓዕ፡ ከመ፡ ዝናም፡ ኃያል፡ ወበረድ፡ ዓበይት፡ ዘይወርድ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord shall make his glorious voice to be heard, and the wrath of his arm, to make a display with wrath and anger and devouring flame: he shall lighten terribly, and his wrath shall be as water and violent hail.
translations.kjv: And the LORD shall cause his glorious voice to be heard, and shall shew the lighting down of his arm, with the indignation of his anger, and with the flame of a devouring fire, with scattering, and tempest, and hailstones.

verses.geez: በቃለ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ይትመውኡ፡ ፋርስ፡ በመቅሠፍት፡ ዘይቀሥፎሙ።

translations.lxx: For by the voice of the Lord the Assyrians shall be overcome, even by the stroke wherewith he shall smite them.
translations.kjv: For through the voice of the LORD shall the Assyrian be beaten down, which smote with a rod.

verses.geez: ወየዐግትዎ፡ እለ፡ ተሰፈወ፡ ከመ፡ ይርድእዎ፡ ወእለ፡ ኪያሆሙ፡ ተአመነ።

translations.lxx: And it shall happen to him from every side, that they from whom their hope of assistance was, in which he trusted, themselves shall war against him in turn with drums and with harp.
translations.kjv: And in every place where the grounded staff shall pass, which the LORD shall lay upon him, it shall be with tabrets and harps: and in battles of shaking will he fight with it.

verses.geez: እስመ፡ ኢኮነ፡ እለ፡ እምቀዲሙ፡ ይትሐዘቦሙ።

translations.lxx: For thou shalt be required before thy time: has it been prepared for thee also to reign? nay, God has prepared for thee a deep trench, wood piled, fire and much wood: the wrath of the Lord shall be as a trench kindled with sulphur.
translations.kjv: For Tophet is ordained of old; yea, for the king it is prepared; he hath made it deep and large: the pile thereof is fire and much wood; the breath of the LORD, like a stream of brimstone, doth kindle it.
